content.text:
All 18 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added loyalty discount that subtracts 20% of policy base when `customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2`.
- Result: All tests now pass (18 passing, 26 todo).
- Approach: Minimal conditional checking the loyalty threshold; computes discount from policy base (not item-modified base, per requirement) and subtracts before final rounding.

Verification for the test case: 2-year customer with sword = 100 (base) + 0 (item surcharges) + 10 (first-insurance 10%) + 5 (fee) - 20 (loyalty 20%) = 95. Matches expected.

Relevant file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_04-51-56_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
